items.title: Missouri RB Ahmad Hardy was shot early Sunday
items.summary: Missouri running back Ahmad Hardy, who finished second among all FBS players with 1,649 rushing yards in 2025, was shot early Sunday at a concert in Mississippi.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: DC opt to bowl; Dwarshuis to make PBKS debut
items.summary: DC made five changes - they brought in Sahil Parakh, Abishek Porel, David Miller, Madhav Tiwari and Auqib Nabi
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Watch: Rangers clinch last final-day decider 35 years ago
items.summary: With Hearts and Celtic on course for a potential final-day decider, we look back to 1991 when it last happened in the Scottish top flight.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
